_comment: DarkBox/Frontier contracts deployed onto the AttestMesh hidden chain (geth-1, chainId 88813) by the one-shot darkbox-deployer, using main's DeployDarkBox (slimmed EIP-170 book e83489e + 1% taker fee dfab20b). Deployer key = GETH1_NODEKEY (private-chain-only, genesis-prefunded). The indexer consumes marketFactory + syntheticUSDC (injected as MARKET_FACTORY_ADDRESS + SYNTHETIC_USDC_ADDRESS via env refresh).
